plugins.name: suaveplan-architect
plugins.description: Start here — interrogates your use case and recommends the right Suaveplan plugins for it (password manager, multiplayer game, SaaS, logistics, etc.)

plugins.description: API framework, gateway, plugins (rate-limit, audit, SSE, webhook, GraphQL)

plugins.description: Universe observer, solar system, stars, tides

plugins.description: Auth, permissions, JWT, OAuth, SLSA, server keys, sandbox

plugins.description: Currency conversion, money math, cryptocurrency wallets
